q.en: Who is the real "mystery artist" whose soccer drawing is hanging in the school hallway?
q.zh: 挂在学校走廊里的“神秘画作”（一幅足球画）真正的作者是谁？

explain.en: Morty admits to Miss Micasso: ""The art in the hall is mine," he admitted."
explain.zh: 莫蒂向米卡索老师承认：“走廊里的画是我的。”

q.en: What does Morty love to do when he is outside?
q.zh: 莫蒂在外面时喜欢做什么？

explain.en: The book says: "When he was outside, he was dribbling his Official Mouse Champion soccer ball."
explain.zh: 书中说：“在外面时，他带着他的‘官方老鼠冠军’足球盘带。”

q.en: In the glossary, what does the word "renowned" mean?
q.zh: 词汇表中，“renowned（著名的）”是什么意思？

options.en: Recognized and admired by many people; famous
options.zh: 被许多人认可和钦佩；著名的

options.en: Learned a skill from a professional
Passed around from person to person

explain.en: The glossary defines "renowned" as "recognized and admired by many people; famous (p. 10)."
explain.zh: 词汇表将“renowned”定义为“被许多人认可和钦佩；著名的”（第10页）。

q.en: According to Miss Micasso, how long did Miceangelo spend on his masterpiece on the chapel ceiling?
q.zh: 根据米卡索老师所说，米老鼠昂杰罗在教堂天花板上创作他的杰作花了多长时间？

explain.en: Miss Micasso says: "Miceangelo spent four years on his masterpiece."
explain.zh: 米卡索老师说：“米老鼠昂杰罗在那件杰作上花了四年时间。”

q.en: What did Miceangelo do that was the only piece of art he ever signed?
q.zh: 米老鼠昂杰罗做了什么——那是他唯一签过名的艺术品？

options.en: Engraved his name into the sash of a marble statue of a woman
options.zh: 把名字刻在一座大理石女性雕像的肩带上
在西斯廷教堂天花板上签名
在一幅梅西画像上签名
在他的第一座雕塑上签名

explain.en: The book says after the statue went on display, "Miceangelo snuck back and engraved his name into this sash. It was the only piece of art he ever signed."
explain.zh: 书中说雕像展出后，“米老鼠昂杰罗偷偷回来把名字刻在肩带上。这是他唯一签过名的艺术品。”

q.en: How did the news of Morty's talent spread through the school?
q.zh: 莫蒂有绘画天赋的消息是如何在学校里传开的？

options.en: It "circulated" quickly after he told Fred and Ben
options.zh: 他告诉弗雷德和本之后迅速“传开”

options.en: Miss Micasso announced it over the loudspeaker
options.zh: 米卡索老师通过广播宣布

options.en: It was printed in the newspaper

explain.en: The book says: "the news of Morty's talent had circulated quickly through the school."
explain.zh: 书中说：“莫蒂有天赋的消息迅速在学校里传开了。”

q.en: The book is a playful retelling that mirrors the real artist Michelangelo. What is the mouse version of Michelangelo called?
q.zh: 这本书是对真实艺术家米开朗基罗的趣味改写。书中老鼠版的“米开朗基罗”叫什么？

explain.en: Miss Micasso asks: ""Have you ever heard of Miceangelo?" He was a renowned Italian artist who lived long ago."
explain.zh: 米卡索老师问：“你听说过米老鼠昂杰罗吗？”他是一位久负盛名的意大利艺术家。

q.en: What does Morty decide to do at the end of Chapter Two?
q.zh: 在第二章结尾，莫蒂决定做什么？

options.zh: 在那幅神秘画作上签名

explain.en: Morty says: "signing the mystery art feels like the right thing to do."
explain.zh: 莫蒂说：“在那幅神秘画作上签名感觉是件正确的事。”

q.en: What does Morty learn about himself by the end of the story?
q.zh: 故事结尾，莫蒂对自己有了什么认识？

options.en: He is a gifted artist and should take ownership of his work
options.zh: 他是一位有天赋的艺术家，应该对自己的作品负责

options.en: He is a better athlete than an artist
options.zh: 他作为运动员比作为艺术家更出色

explain.en: Miss Micasso tells him: "you're a very gifted artist, and you should consider taking ownership of your work."
explain.zh: 米卡索老师告诉他：“你是一位很有天赋的艺术家，应该考虑为自己的作品负责。”

q.en: Why does Miss Micasso tell Morty about Miceangelo?
q.zh: 米卡索老师为什么给莫蒂讲米老鼠昂杰罗的故事？

options.en: To help Morty see that a great artist also did things besides his main passion
options.zh: 让莫蒂明白一位伟大的艺术家也会做主业之外的事

options.en: To tell him to move to Rome
To explain why he should sign everything
options.zh: 解释为什么他应该给所有作品签名

explain.en: Morty thinks: "Maybe Miceangelo was like me... He wanted to sculpt, and I want to play soccer, but we are both pretty good at other things, too."
explain.zh: 莫蒂想：“也许米老鼠昂杰罗和我一样……他想雕刻，而我想踢足球，但我们俩在别的事情上也都很在行。”

prompt.en: Imagine you discovered a hidden talent like Morty. Write a paragraph about a talent you have that surprises others, and draw a small picture of you doing it.
prompt.zh: 想象你像莫蒂一样发现了一项隐藏的天赋。写一段话，描述你拥有一项让他人惊讶的天赋，并画一幅你正在做这件事的小图。

en: Think about something you are good at that friends might not expect.
Use Morty's experience of admitting his art to help you explain how it feels.
zh: 想一件你擅长、但朋友可能想不到的事。
借鉴莫蒂承认自己会画画的经验，来描述这种感受。
